case_title: POOJA SHRESTHA VS. STEFANIA TORRES RUEDA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,027.41 FILED BY SHRESTHA, POOJA AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES RUEDA, STEFANIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2025 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO FEB-28-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF POOJA SHRESTHA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEFANIA TORRES RUEDA IS PRESENT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHRESTHA, POOJA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES RUEDA, STEFANIA $2,027.41 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,327.41, MS. TORRES AGREES TO PAY MS. SHRESTHA BY MARCH 28, 2025 TO AVOID ANY INTEREST BEING ADDED TO THE FULL AMOUNT. MS. SHRESTHA AGREES. HOWEVER, IF MS. TORRES FAILS TO PAY THE FULL AMOUNT, WITH COSTS, BY 3/28/25, INTEREST OF 10% WILL ACCRUE ON ANY UNPAID AMOUNTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
